## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows existing patterns (no arbitrary style changes)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new env vars were added
- [ ] Branch targets `develop` (not `main` directly)
- [ ] PR title is descriptive (e.g. `fix: student 500 error on /students GET`)
